evidence.claim: Designed hybrid retrieval system (BM25 + dense vector) handling 8K QPS with sub-200ms p95
evidence.source_text: designed the company's first hybrid retrieval system combining BM25 with dense vector recall, handling peak QPS of 8K with sub-200ms p95

evidence.claim: Led migration from keyword to embedding-based search for 30M+ corpus
evidence.source_text: Led the migration from keyword-based to embedding-based search across a 30M+ candidate corpus over 8 months.

evidence.claim: Improved recruiter engagement by 24% and reduced time-to-shortlist by 38%
evidence.source_text: The final embedding ranker improved recruiter engagement metrics by 24% and reduced the average time-to-shortlist by 38%.
Mentored two junior engineers through this rollout.

evidence.claim: Built RAG-based ranking pipeline serving 50M+ queries/month
evidence.source_text: Built a RAG-based ranking pipeline serving 50M+ queries per month for an internal recruiter-facing search product.

evidence.claim: Technical stack: Elasticsearch, LangChain, TensorFlow, FAISS, HNSW, pgvector, Qdrant, Weights & Biases
evidence.source_text: Skills: Elasticsearch... LangChain... TensorFlow... FAISS HNSW... pgvector... Weights & Biases... Qdrant

evidence.claim: Designed offline evaluation framework (NDCG, MRR, recall@K)
evidence.source_text: Designed the offline evaluation framework from scratch — NDCG, MRR, recall@K calibrated against online A/B engagement metrics.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes shipping working systems over theoretical perfection
evidence.source_text: I care more about shipping a working system in 6 weeks than a theoretically perfect one in 6 months.

evidence.claim: Focuses on infrastructure and system reliability
evidence.source_text: Most of the engineering effort went into the boring infrastructure: index versioning, embedding versioning, rollback paths, and the dashboards that let recruiters trust the new system.
